sectionOrderRules: Hero must state what the company manufactures and include a primary contact CTA.
Product summary should show concrete product types or manufacturing focus, not vague promises.
Trust proof must rely on real references, lead times, material information or customer reviews when available.
Avoid repeating the same examples in both product summary and gallery without adding new information.
Products intro must explain what kinds of goods, components or custom products are offered.
Product list items must be specific and grouped in a way that fits the business, such as panel, packaging, interior details, components or custom production.
If pricing information is shown, it must be indicative and clearly framed when variation depends on material, dimensions or volume.
Services intro must connect the production capability to customer needs such as custom dimensions, series production or finishing.
Service list should describe actual manufacturing or support services, not generic business statements.
Process summary should clarify how an order typically moves from inquiry to delivery.
References intro must explain what the examples represent, such as completed jobs, product examples or delivered series.
Reference gallery should use real project or product examples and may include short context like material, use case or scope.
Do not present speculative outcomes or unsupported claims about customer results.
About story must be specific about the companys background, production focus or way of working.
Team should only be shown when actual people or roles are available.
Trust proof may include sourcing information, years of experience, production know-how or references, but must stay factual.
Contact info must include the real contact channels that are available and should not use placeholder content.
Contact CTA should support quote requests, drawings, measurements or other useful inquiry details when relevant.
Map and opening hours are optional and should only appear when the business has public-facing visit information.
